title: Fundraiser after blaze burns down Carpe Diem classrooms
description: GEORGE NEWS - The George Rotary Club is set...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The George Rotary Club is set to host a remarkable event, and they are asking everyone to join hands for Carpe Diem School.


> The event aims to extend support to the school, which endured a devastating blow as two classes and essential resources were razed to the ground in February this year.


In an effort to uplift spirits and rally support, the George Male Choir, Carpe Diem Choir, and the Junior Mount Primary School Choirs will grace the occasion with their melodious renditions. Adding an international flair to the event, the Neuer Kammerchor from Heidenheim, Germany, will also be present, further enriching the evening.

The event aims to raise funds for the school in its journey of recovery. Funds raised during the event will be used towards rebuilding the damaged classrooms.

Previous article: Classrooms at Carpe Diem gutted by blaze

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
